Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows significant renal impairment (markedly elevated creatinine), proteinuria, and abnormal urine findings (cloudy, brown, low specific gravity, glucosuria, ketonuria), suggesting possible nephrotic syndrome or acute kidney injury. Hypoglycemia and low HbA1c are noted. No evidence of urinary tract infection. Recommend urgent nephrology evaluation and further assessment for underlying causes of renal dysfunction and metabolic abnormalities.
